messages.text: The tollkeeper swings a great fused cluster of skull-bells at you on its braided cord, and it tolls once, deep and final, as it slams into you. The blow {verb} you!
The tollkeeper hauls a booming skull-bell round at your head and you drop under it as it tolls through the empty air where you stood.
The tollkeeper catches you between two swinging clusters and they toll together through you, and for a heartbeat you are the clapper of the whole crypt! The blow {verb} you!
